# NomadBase Initial Request
- request: Build NomadBase app (Remote Work Hub) using Streamlit and Google Sheets.
- user: Liran

## AC
- Streamlit UI for logging and viewing cafes/co-working spaces.
- Data storage in Google Sheets (free tier).
- Fields: name, wifi speed rating, noise level rating, coffee quality rating, laptop-friendly (Y/N), outlets availability (Y/N).
- Search/Filter functionality by rating/features.

## STATUS
- task: nomadbase-app-build
- WIP

- Intake initialized.
